title: Deliciously Garlicky Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A flavorful and savory Spanish dish featuring chicken, garlic, and lemon zest, perfect for a hangover cure, made FODMAP friendly and cooked to a molten perfection with air fryer, it is a garlicky Spanish chicken paella.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, salt, pepper, and saffron threads.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and coat with the marinade.
Air fry the chicken for 10 minutes or until cooked through.
Mince the garlic cloves and mix with lemon zest.
Add the garlic and lemon mixture to the air fryer and cook for 1 minute.
Add the uncooked Arborio rice to the air fryer and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in 2 cups of chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
